response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong software engineering experience with a varied background in full-stack development, DevOps, and systems programming, but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, or GPU architecture—key requirements for this role. His expertise in web/mobile development and general-purpose software does not align closely enough with the specialized hardware-software co-design and performance optimization needs of this Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven expertise in performance optimization, DevOps, and system architecture design
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerators, or hardware-software co-design
Lacks background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Education and experience do not meet the required qualifications for Principal-level hardware optimization roles

key_factors.factor: Relevant educational background (PhD/advanced degree + hardware focus)
